Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Granting Preference In Setting Case For Trial, Maintaining The Current Trial Date
Off Calendar Nov-17-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Tiffany Viveros of BRAYTON & PURCELL LLP (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiffs / moving parties Isom Lee and Catherine Lee
Laura Przetak of SPANOS | PRZETAK (510-250-0200), Designated Defense Counsel

RULING:
PLAINTIFFS' MOTION FOR ORDER GRANTING PREFERENCE IN SETTING CASE FOR TRIAL, MAINTAINING THE CURRENT TRIAL DATE

No objection made and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiffs' motion to maintain the trial date with preference is granted. The January 25, 2016 trial date, which has a next return date of November 28, 2016, is maintained with preference status pursuant to C.C.P. 36(a). Last day pursuant to C.C.P. 36(f) is March 17, 2017. Fact and expert discovery remain closed. The parties are ordered to provide confidential settlement demands stating their best and final offers. These confidential demands must be submitted to Pang Ly by November 18, 2016 at 3:00p.m. Settlement conference in room 603 at 9:00a.m. on November 22, 2016. There will be a mandatory settlement conference with the Court pursuant to San Francisco Local Rules of Court Rule 5 on November 28, 2016 at 1:30p.m. in Department 503. The parties shall comply with Local Rule 5.0 and provide a confidential settlement statement by November 23, 2016 at 12:00p.m. No opposition filed. Order signed in open court. Judge: Garrett L. Wong, Reporter: Erin F. Robinson of AIKEN WELCH, CSR # 12199 (Tel: 510-451-1580) (503/GLW)
